name: Marinated Rabbit
recipeInstructions:
White onions unsliced.
1. Cut rabbit into serving pieces and rub with salt and pepper. Place in a large bowl; add marinade. Refrigerate overnight.
2. Drain rabbit; do not pat dry. Strain the marinade.
3. In a large cast iron frying pan over high heat, quickly brown all sides of rabbit pieces in hot Canola (or vegetable) oil.
4. When brown, pour in the reserved marinade and simmer over low heat for 1 hour or until tender.
5. Just before the rabbit is done, sauté the onions, olives, and mushrooms in butter.
6. Add to the rabbit mixture.
7. Serve with boiled potatoes.
